payload.title: Retire shared SCOPE_TOKEN + e2e integration tests + docs
payload.description: After the above land: rotate and remove the single SCOPE_TOKEN from the hosted path; add end-to-end integration tests against the wired cloud server (OIDC login -> session -> tenant-scoped read/write -> sync push authz -> API-key auth). Update docs/deploy.md + the deploy runbook; note the LAN/mTLS path is unchanged.
